### Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`go test ./... -count=1`)
- [ ] No vet warnings (`go vet ./...`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`make build`)
- [ ] Conventional commit message (e.g. `feat(go/agent): ...`)
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] No breaking changes (or described below)
